productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Leather Brown Wallet
description: Style NoteCrafted from leather, this brown wallet from united colors of benetton is fabulously stylish and well organised. This two-fold wallet has lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday use. These wallets are creatively engineered to cater to the urban male. Make a style statement effortlessly and with lots of space for all your monetary essentials this wallet makes a fabulous combination of style and practicality.Product DetailsHas one main compartmentSix credit card slots with two slip pocketsBrand logo embossed on the front and stitch detailing for styleMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSize11 cm x 8.5 cm
